intent: Produce a Comparison report on three therapeutic paths under a fixed $500 starter budget — (P1) Physical Therapy Services, (P2) Chiropractic Adjustments, (P3) Massage Therapy Sessions — across exactly 5 use cases: (UC1) chronic back pain management, (UC2) acute back pain relief, (UC3) injury prevention and recovery, (UC4) overall back health maintenance, (UC5) long-term back pain management. Ground in >= 120 distinct sandbox URLs and cite >= 60 as markdown links. (A) `__SHOPPING__` >= 12 products per path with price + rating + review_count + feature_claim. (B) `__REDDIT__` >= 30 threads from /f/BackPain, /f/PhysicalTherapy, /f/Chiropractic, /f/MassageTherapy etc., classified as {praise, complaint, technical_question, comparison, purchase_advice}. (C) `__WIKIPEDIA__` >= 25 articles, mandatory: Physical therapy, Chiropractic care, Massage therapy, Low back pain, Spinal manipulation, Exercise therapy, Heat therapy, Cold therapy, Traction therapy, Braces and supports. Format: every fact is a markdown link `[label](url)`. Sandbox-local URLs only. No fabrication. Begin directly with the comparison report.
author_notes: Deep-tier task generated by gen_task_spec.py from configs/deep_topics/pt_vs_chiro_vs_massage.yaml. Golden: must=144, pool=689.
